headline: Routing guides are crumbling: ‘It is different this time’
summary: Some shippers are being forced to reprice their entire book as contractual truckload rates set just a couple of months ago are no longer being honored. The post Routing guides are crumbling: ‘It is different this time’ appeared first on FreightWaves.
